2605.12178.title: Do Enterprise Systems Need Learned World Models? The Importance of Context to Infer Dynamics
2605.12178.paper_summary: World models enable agents to anticipate the effects of their actions by internalizing environment dynamics. In enterprise systems, however, these dynamics are often defined by tenant-specific business logic that varies across deployments and evolves over time, making models trained on historical transitions brittle under deployment shift. We ask a question the world-models literature has not addressed: when the rules can be read at inference time, does an agent still need to learn them? We argue, and demonstrate empirically, that in settings where transition dynamics are configurable and readable, runtime discovery complements offline training by grounding predictions in the active system instance. We propose enterprise discovery agents, which recover relevant transition dynamics at runtime by reading the system's configuration rather than relying solely on internalized representations. We introduce CascadeBench, a reasoning-focused benchmark for enterprise cascade prediction that adopts the evaluation methodology of World of Workflows on diverse synthetic environments, and use it together with deployment-shift evaluation to show that offline-trained world models can perform well in-distribution but degrade as dynamics change, whereas discovery-based agents are more robust under shift by grounding their predictions in the current instance. Our findings suggest that, in configurable enterprise environments, agents should not rely solely on fixed internalized dynamics, but should incorporate mechanisms for discovering relevant transition logic at runtime.
2605.12178.paper_summary_zh: 世界模型使代理能夠透過內部化環境動態來預測其行動的效果。然而，在企業系統中，這些動態通常由特定租戶的業務邏輯定義，這些邏輯在不同的部署中各不相同並隨時間演變，使得基於歷史轉換訓練的模型在部署變更下變得脆弱。我們提出一個世界模型文獻尚未解答的問題：當規則可以在推理時讀取時，代理還需要學習它們嗎？我們主張並實證證明，在轉換動態可配置且可讀的環境中，運行時發現可以補充離線訓練，通過將預測基於當前系統實例來增強其準確性。我們提出了企業發現代理，這些代理通過讀取系統的配置而不是僅依賴內部化的表徵，來在運行時恢復相關的轉換動態。我們介紹了CascadeBench，一個專注於推理的企業級級聯預測基準，該基準採用了在多樣化合成環境中進行的工作流世界評估方法，並與部署變更評估結合使用，以顯示離線訓練的世界模型在分佈內表現良好，但隨著動態變化而退化，而基於發現的代理則在變更下更具韌性，因為它們的預測根植於當前實例。我們的研究結果表明，在可配置的企業環境中，代理不應僅依賴固定的內部化動態，而應納入在運行時發現相關轉換邏輯的機制。
2605.12178.author: Jishnu Sethumadhavan Nair et.al.
2605.12178.authors: Jishnu Sethumadhavan Nair, Patrice Bechard, Rishabh Maheshwary, Surajit Dasgupta, Sravan Ramachandran, Aakash Bhagat, Shruthan Radhakrishna, Pulkit Pattnaik, Johan Obando-Ceron, Shiva Krishna Reddy Malay, Sagar Davasam, Seganrasan Subramanian, Vipul Mittal, Sridhar Krishna Nemala, Christopher Pal, Srinivas Sunkara, Sai Rajeswar
